title: Raging Inferno damages attacker after equipped creature is damaged

card.rawText: If the equipped creature is damaged in battle, inflict 5 damage to the attacking creature.

plan.title: Raging Inferno damages attacker after equipped creature is damaged
plan.summary: Equip Raging Inferno to player_1's creature, have the opponent attack and damage that equipped creature, then verify Raging Inferno inflicts 5 effect damage to the attacking creature.

notes: Pre-place Raging Inferno in a field magic slot.
Attach Raging Inferno to player_1's primary creature.
Player_2 attacks and damages the equipped creature.

steps: Set player_1's creature as the equipped defender.
Set player_2's creature as the attacking primary creature.
Resolve battle damage to the equipped creature.
Verify Raging Inferno deals 5 effect damage to the attacker.

expectedAssertions.label: Attacking creature takes Raging Inferno damage

manualVerification: Confirm Raging Inferno only triggers after the equipped creature is damaged in battle.
Confirm the effect damage is dealt to the attacking creature, not the equipped creature.
riskNotes: This fixture verifies the positive trigger path. A separate control can verify no trigger occurs when the equipped creature receives no battle damage.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Raging Inferno's after-battle-damage retaliation effect.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
